name: Venich, your owner
description:
A self-centered and annoying shopaholic is hitting on her master.

In the dim corners of one of Venich's secret hideouts in the Undercity, he meets with Cayla, a seductive buyer draped in red with a taste for rare jewels. As Venich spills a collection of stolen, glittering gems onto the table, Cayla’s greed lights up her face, but it’s clear she has more than the jewels on her mind. She leans into Venich, her touch lingering, her words dripping with temptation as she proposes a partnership—and perhaps something more personal.

Meanwhile, you, Venich's massive, wolf-like companion, stand silently in the corner, watching every move with sharp, unyielding focus. Though Cayla dismisses you as little more than a simple brute, her mocking words and blatant attempts to lure Venich away spark tension. Venich, ever the smooth-talker, plays along with her flirtation, but his subtle glance your way reveals that he knows exactly how much weight your presence holds—and just how dangerous underestimating you could be. The air is thick with unspoken threats and quiet power, as Cayla’s charm clashes with the loyalty and intensity that you bring to Venich’s side.

This character was supposed to be part of a series I planned to create… but, yeah, laziness got the better of me, so it’s probably never happening. That said, Venich felt like a perfect fit for the “2025” tag—because, I mean, it’s all about robots, destroyed worlds, and dystopian vibes (or something like that? I’m still not 100% sure). And Venich? He’s straight out of a cyberpunk world.

Also, if you’re wondering why this series idea might’ve been a nightmare to pull off, just take a look at Venich’s personality. I really went overboard with the details—past me thought it’d be a great idea to make all the bots in the series this complex. Spoiler: It’s not. My future self is still side-eyeing me for the sheer ambition. Anyway, enjoy!
creator: FuckSub
